name: Plumb Memory
description: Auto-ingest and memory injection for OpenClaw

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite database file. Defaults to ~/.plumb/memory.db

userId.description: User ID for scoping memory. Defaults to 'default'

shadowMode.description: If true, retrieves memory context but does not inject it into prompts

queryPort.description: Port for the query server. Defaults to 18791
